author: agenticbranduniverse.com/registry
description: A wordless ink-line illustration that carries mood. Generated from a style pack, never carrying text.

generators.pinReason: No locked golden carries this look. The model's own hand IS the register, so swapping the provider changes the brand.

perSlot.id: flat: no perspective, shading, gradients, or coloured linework
hands-loopy-non-anatomical, four fingers plus a thumb
at most 4 elements, generous negative space
ground is one flat pack-palette colour
